texto: This is unreal. This might be like the biggest trout I've ever held or seen in person. This is at least 15 pounds. I gotta go look up the state record when I get home because this legit might be a state record. Dead tiger trout.

segmentos.text: This might be like the biggest trout I've ever held or seen in person.
I gotta go look up the state record when I get home
because this legit might be a state record.
